recommendations.title: Haseen Dillruba
recommendations.overview: Under investigation as a suspect in her husband's murder, a wife reveals details of their thorny marriage that seem to only further blur the truth.

recommendations.title: Shirley
recommendations.overview: A famous horror writer finds inspiration for her next book after she and her husband take in a young couple.

recommendations.title: All Good Things
recommendations.overview: Newly-discovered facts, court records and speculation are used to elaborate the true love story and murder mystery of the most notorious unsolved murder case in New York history.

recommendations.title: Reptile
recommendations.overview: Following the brutal murder of a young real estate agent, a hardened detective attempts to uncover the truth in a case where nothing is as it seems, and by doing so dismantles the illusions in his own life.

recommendations.title: Drishyam 2
recommendations.overview: 7 years after the case related to Vijay Salgaonkar and his family was closed, a series of unexpected events bring truth to light that threatens to change everything for the Salgaonkars. Can Vijay save his family this time?

recommendations.title: The Bay of Silence
recommendations.overview: Will believes his wife Rosalind is innocent of their son's suspected murder, only to discover the devastating truth behind her past links her to another unsolved crime.

recommendations.title: Anatomy of a Fall
recommendations.overview: A woman is suspected of her husband's murder, and their blind son faces a moral dilemma as the sole witness.

recommendations.title: Agatha and the Truth of Murder

recommendations.title: The Secret in Their Eyes

recommendations.title: The Housemaid
